text: eve — the auth-refactor login page is going to need the new Button component from design-system-v2. is the primary button variant stable enough to use? I don't want to build against something that's going to change
the primary button is locked and published to npm. you can use @bsus/design-system@2.1.0. the secondary and ghost variants are still in progress for design-system-v2 but primary is safe
hey alice — for mobile-app we need SSO to work on the native login screen. is the auth-refactor going to ship the new OAuth endpoints before our february release? we're blocked on mobile login
the new OAuth2 PKCE flow should be on staging by jan 31. auth-refactor is prioritizing the token endpoint specifically so mobile-app can integrate. I'll ping you when it's ready to test

nina — I'm building the onboarding wizard for onboarding-redesign and want to use the new form components from design-system-v2. are the Input and Select components ready? don't want to build my own if yours are close
Input is ready, Select is about a week out for design-system-v2. I'd say use Input now and I'll fast-track Select for you. want me to add the onboarding-redesign use case to our test matrix?
heads up — infra-migration is moving the CI/CD pipeline to GitHub Actions next week. the auth-refactor deploy scripts will break because they reference the old Jenkins paths. can you update them?
thanks for the heads up. I'll update the auth-refactor deploy configs this week. can you share the new GitHub Actions workflow template so I can match the infra-migration conventions?
henry — for onboarding-redesign we want to deep link new users straight into the app tutorial from the welcome email. does mobile-app support deep links to arbitrary screens yet?
we just shipped deep link support in mobile-app build 47. you can link to any screen using bsus://screen/{screen_id}. I'll send you the docs. what screens does onboarding-redesign need?

oscar — I'm pulling some of the brand refresh typography specs into design-system-v2. the heading scale from the brand-refresh is perfect but the body font changed since then. should I use the updated brand guidelines or the old brand-refresh ones?
use the updated brand guidelines — the brand-refresh body font was Inter but we switched to Geist for design-system-v2. the heading scale from brand-refresh is still good though, keep that

infra-migration prod cutover is next tuesday. the auth-refactor services are the first things moving to the new cluster. bob — make sure the db migration rollback script works against the new RDS instance
tested the rollback against the new RDS — works clean. one thing: the infra-migration secrets manager path changed so auth-refactor's connection string env var needs updating. filing a PR now
grace — the Checkbox component just shipped in design-system-v2. I know onboarding-redesign has that checklist pattern — want me to walk you through the API?
yes please! the onboarding-redesign checklist is the main onboarding widget. I was about to build a custom one so perfect timing. can we pair on it tomorrow?
alice — the mobile-app is getting 401s from the new auth endpoint on staging. are the auth-refactor PKCE changes deployed there yet? our mobile login is completely broken on the latest TestFlight
just checked — the auth-refactor staging deploy failed because of the infra-migration CI changes. dave is on it. should be back up within the hour. sorry about that
nina — the auth-refactor error states need the new Alert component from design-system-v2. is it in storybook yet? we have error, warning, and info variants needed
Alert shipped in design-system-v2 last week with all three variants. here's the storybook link. also fyi the design-system-v2 Toast component is coming next if auth-refactor needs notifications too
priya — onboarding-redesign needs the activation metrics that mobile-app is tracking. can ryan share the event schema? we want to track the same funnel events on web so we can compare
totally — the mobile-app event schema is documented in confluence. I'll have ryan send you the link. makes sense to align onboarding-redesign web events with what we already have
hey grace — I'm picking up the tooltips for onboarding-redesign. should I use the Tooltip from design-system-v2 or is there a custom one for this project?
use the design-system-v2 Tooltip — it just shipped and has all the positioning logic built in. way better than rolling our own for onboarding-redesign. I'll send you the import path

dave — the auth-refactor API gateway config needs to change for the infra-migration. the new k8s ingress uses different path rewriting rules. I updated the config but can you verify it matches the infra-migration spec?
verified — the path rewriting looks correct. one thing: infra-migration added a new rate limiter at the ingress level that auth-refactor should be aware of. 100 req/s per client. I updated the docs

reviewed the auth-refactor token signing changes — looks solid but one concern: if design-system-v2 ships the SSO login widget before we rotate the signing keys, users could hit a brief auth failure. let's coordinate the rollout

eve — the mobile-app React Native bundle is huge partly because we're vendoring old UI components. any chance design-system-v2 will have a React Native compatible package? would love to share components

we've been discussing a React Native layer for design-system-v2 but it's not on the roadmap yet. for now mobile-app should keep using the vendored components. I'll flag it for the design-system-v2 Q2 planning

quinn — I finished the tooltip implementation for onboarding-redesign using the design-system-v2 component. also noticed the mobile-app has a similar onboarding flow — should we sync with henry to keep them consistent?
